title: MBU: More Berry Uses!
description: Make Sweet Berries and Glow Berries more useful in your world!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/342214f5d33b816904a3eb9f72886b3dc0a045dc.png)

![Fabric](https://voxelforge-oss.github.io/voxicons/voxicons/icons-64/brands/fabric.png)
![NeoForge](https://voxelforge-oss.github.io/voxicons/voxicons/icons-64/brands/neoforge.png)
![Forge](https://voxelforge-oss.github.io/voxicons/voxicons/icons-64/brands/forge.png)

## Make Sweet Berries and Glow Berries more useful!

More Berry Uses adds 7 new craftable food items, 3 extra recipes to make existing items and a bunch of wandering trader trades into your world to make Sweet Berries and Glow Berries the berry best.

## New Items

The following new items will be added to your world:

| Black Forest Cake | Fruit Salad | Sweet Berry Pie |
| ----------------- | ----------- | --------------- |
| ![black forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da8238ec22cf3e8f157a73ce2f921fe55a647447.png) | ![fruit salad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12e0108d216bd40c87163097e88a573e7ec73b99.png) | ![Berry Pie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d0fc3bf726cae233bfa4d82569db153120650ba.png) |

| Trail Mix | Jam | Glow Berry Muffin | Glow Berry Smoothie |
| --------- | --- | ----------------- | ------------------- |
| ![Trail mix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67ea65325368ff90292449029a9daf2befc6b545.png) | ![Jam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2afded197854fb519a2a8dbc532b71ae485320e5.png) | ![Muffin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c8680ac56ea3699497dd78bdfb0b8a5e4378bd5.png) | ![Smoothie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9ecc5c82c39effceb14da8c093896b47628465a.png) |

## New Item Effects

The two new Glow Berry food items will give you an effect after consuming:

- Eating a Glow Berry Muffin will give you night vision for a very short duration of time.
- Drinking a Glow Berry Smoothie has a 9/10 chance of giving you a short burst of night vision or a 1/10 chance of giving you blindness. Choose wisely when to use this item.

## New recipes for old items

You can now make red dye from Sweet Berries, orange dye from Glow Berries and Glow Item Frames from Glow Berries:

| Red Dye | Orange Dye | Glow Item Frame |
| ------- | ---------- | ---------- |
| ![Red Dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b41f9b4b162c25f4ba7030aaf740642dc5a2ff78.png) | ![Orange Dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ba3143d8e4ebfa883abaa6aea4a0b7d8efd3516.png) | ![Glow frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1fd01ac4e8b03214fb0bdbe0f7da97f63efe278.png) |

## New Wandering Trader Trades

The Wandering Trader will now buy and sell more items related to berries.

![Trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2846b986dae834c284d6bc6666871fc65babcae3_0.webp)
